heading: Certain expenses for which credits are allowable
label: 280C Certain expenses for which credits are allowable

children.heading: Rule for employment credits
children.label: a Rule for employment credits
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed for that portion of the wages or salaries paid or incurred for the taxable year which is equal to the sum of the credits determined for the taxable year under sections 45A(a), 45P(a), 45S(a)(1)(A), 51(a), and 1396(a). No deduction shall be allowed for that portion of the premiums paid or incurred for the taxable year which is equal to that portion of the paid family and medical leave credit which is determined for the taxable year under section 45S(a)(1)(B). In the case of a corporation which is a member of a controlled group of corporations (within the meaning of section 52(a)) or a trade or business which is treated as being under common control with other trades or businesses (within the meaning of section 52(b)), this subsection shall be applied under rules prescribed by the Secretary similar to the rules applicable under subsections (a) and (b) of section 52.

children.heading: Credit for qualified clinical testing expenses for certain drugs
children.label: b Credit for qualified clinical testing expenses for certain drugs

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed for that portion of the qualified clinical testing expenses (as defined in section 45C(b)) otherwise allowable as a deduction for the taxable year which is equal to the amount of the credit allowable for the taxable year under section 45C (determined without regard to section 38(c)).

children.heading: Similar rule where taxpayer capitalizes rather than deducts expenses
children.label: 2 Similar rule where taxpayer capitalizes rather than deducts expenses
A
children.text: the amount of the credit allowable for the taxable year under section 45C (determined without regard to section 38(c)), exceeds

children.label: B
children.text: the amount allowable as a deduction for the taxable year for qualified clinical testing expenses (determined without regard to paragraph (1)),

children.label: i
children.text: paragraphs (1) and (2) shall not apply, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of the credit under section 45C(a) shall be the amount determined under subparagraph (B).

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of credit determined under section 45C(a) without regard to this paragraph, over

children.label: I
children.text: the amount described in clause (i), and

children.label: II
children.text: the maximum rate of tax under section 11(b).

children.heading: Election
children.label: C Election
children.text: An election under this paragraph for any taxable year shall be made not later than the time for filing the return of tax for such year (including extensions), shall be made on such return, and shall be made in such manner as the Secretary shall prescribe. Such an election, once made, shall be irrevocable.

children.heading: Controlled groups
children.label: 4 Controlled groups
children.text: In the case of a corporation which is a member of a controlled group of corporations (within the meaning of section 41(f)(5)) or a trade or business which is treated as being under common control with other trades or business (within the meaning of section 41(f)(1)(B)), this subsection shall be applied under rules prescribed by the Secretary similar to the rules applicable under subparagraphs (A) and (B) of section 41(f)(1).

children.heading: Credit for increasing research activities
children.label: c Credit for increasing research activities

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The domestic research or experimental expenditures (as defined in section 174A(b)) otherwise taken into account as a deduction or charged to capital account under this chapter shall be reduced by the amount of the credit allowed under section 41(a).

children.label: i
children.text: paragraph (1) shall not apply, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of the credit under section 41(a) shall be the amount determined under subparagraph (B).

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of credit determined under section 41(a) without regard to this paragraph, over

children.label: I
children.text: the amount described in clause (i), and

children.label: II
children.text: the maximum rate of tax under section 11(b).

children.heading: Election
children.label: C Election
children.text: An election under this paragraph for any taxable year shall be made not later than the time for filing the return of tax for such year (including extensions), shall be made on such return, and shall be made in such manner as the Secretary may prescribe. Such an election, once made, shall be irrevocable.

children.heading: Controlled groups
children.label: 3 Controlled groups
children.text: Paragraph (3) of subsection (b) shall apply for purposes of this subsection.

children.heading: Credit for low sulfur diesel fuel production
children.label: d Credit for low sulfur diesel fuel production
children.text: The deductions otherwise allowed under this chapter for the taxable year shall be reduced by the amount of the credit determined for the taxable year under section 45H(a).

children.heading: Mine rescue team training credit
children.label: e Mine rescue team training credit
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed for that portion of the expenses otherwise allowable as a deduction for the taxable year which is equal to the amount of the credit determined for the taxable year under section 45N(a).

children.heading: Credit for security of agricultural chemicals
children.label: f Credit for security of agricultural chemicals
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed for that portion of the expenses otherwise allowable as a deduction taken into account in determining the credit under section 45O for the taxable year which is equal to the amount of the credit determined for such taxable year under section 45O(a).

children.heading: Credit for health insurance premiums
children.label: g Credit for health insurance premiums
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed for the portion of the premiums paid by the taxpayer for coverage of 1 or more individuals under a qualified health plan which is equal to the amount of the credit determined for the taxable year under section 36B(a) with respect to such premiums.

children.heading: Credit for employee health insurance expenses of small employers
children.label: h Credit for employee health insurance expenses of small employers
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed for that portion of the premiums for qualified health plans (as defined in section 1301(a) of the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act), or for health insurance coverage in the case of taxable years beginning in 2010, 2011, 2012, or 2013, paid by an employer which is equal to the amount of the credit determined under section 45R(a) with respect to the premiums.
